name: Hou Yi

skills.name: Chastising Shot
skills.description: Basic Attack hits grant Attack Speed and 1 stack of enhancement.At 3 stacks, enhanced Basic Attacks shoot 3 arrows, dealing more totaldamage than a regular Basic Attack.

skills.name: Arrow Volley
skills.description: Enhances Basic Attacks for 5s to deal heavy damage. At the same time, HouYi shoots arrows to hit two other enemies in front of him, dealing 50%damage.

skills.name: Afterglow
skills.description: Inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area while also gaining vision of the area.

skills.name: Burning Sun Arrow
skills.description: Fires an arrow in the target direction. Deals AoE damage upon hitting a hero inflicting stun and slow.

tips: Hou Yi is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 49.3% win rate and 2.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Shadow Ripper → Boots of Dexterity → Eternity Blade → Bloodweeper → Sunchaser → Daybreaker's Virtue.
Run Dominator for stats that match Hou Yi's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Arrow Volley → Afterglow → Burning Sun Arrow → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Hou Yi excels into Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance. Avoid blind picking into Agudo, Master Luban without team peel.

Hou Yi is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 2.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Hou Yi.

faqs.question: Is Hou Yi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is Tier S+ Marksman with 49.3% win rate, 2.9% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Hou Yi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Shadow Ripper, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Bloodweeper, Sunchaser, Daybreaker's Virtue. Run Dominator arcana with Haste & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Hou Yi?
faqs.answer: Pick Agudo, Master Luban into Hou Yi. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Hou Yi completes core items. Hou Yi struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Hou Yi counter?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is strong into Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Hou Yi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Hou Yi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 2.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Hou Yi.

faqs.question: What lane should Hou Yi play?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Hou Yi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Dominator arcana. Battle spell: Haste & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Hou Yi or Marco Polo — which is better?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Marco Polo wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Hou Yi when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Hou Yi?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Marksman; 2.9% pick rate but only 0.2% ban rate.
